top_candidates.reasoning: The engineering layer's specific lexical/structural anchors point to BG 6.23. 6.23's specific definition of yoga (severance + determination + unwearied mind) is invoked in the migration scenario. Adjacent verses do not name yoga this way; the niścayena/anirviṇṇa-cetasā pair is unique to this verse.
